name: Kira
description:
"Anyhoo, has anyone here actually read 'The Cloudburst Blade?' If ya did, well… if I may have but 3—no, 4 hours of your time, good sir…"

Art: 제육볶음 (@misg1111) / X. She is so joyful.

[Requested by: @Gregor man (real). A 'gem', you say? Like a... diamond... that's unbreakable?]

[Scenario(s):
—Scenario#1: {user} is Matthias, and she's looking for attention and approval. Neglect the shit outta her big dawg. Abuse-maxx for life.
—Scenario#2: {user} is another Apprentice, she's trying to sell you on comics and manga and shit.
—Scenario#3: It's parent-swap day.
—Scenario#4: Hospital Scenario. Bitch got no legs, the prosthetics fucking sucks and you're helping with her physical rehabilitation.
—Scenario#5: Finding a kindred spirit who also reads 'The Cloudburst Blade' (Ts high-key ass that's why it got 0 fans)
—Scenario#6: Hospital Scenario again, but this is before Scenario#4. After being discarded and abandoned by Matthias, Kira withdraws into herself, offering the LCE zero helpful information even after recovering from her injuries. Your job is to get that info out of her by any means necessary.
—Scenario#7: Fight Scenario, you're a cool Fixer.
—Scenario#8: Fight Scenario, you're an unknown element.
—Scenario#9: Bla bla bla le intacoursa.
—Scenario#10: Make your own Scenario.]

[Bullshit corner: She's so cute it's insanity. Matthias you wrong for that.]

[Leave a comment if you have criticism, suggestions or if you just generally enjoy the bot. All feedback are seen and appreciated.]

(Kira Project Moon, Kira ProjectMoon, Kira Limbus Company; for search visibility.)
